raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, my credit card was fraudulently charged {$430.00}. I have tried contacting Citibank many times, but have not received a resolution. That month, there were five fraudulent charges on my account. Four of them have already been resolved, but this one has not been addressed. 
Over the past several months, I have made numerous calls but I have not received any clear explanation or resolution. This has caused me significant frustration and concern over the security of my account. My dispute case number XXXX
